item.title: Remove backlog sync command
item.intent: The backlog sync command is removed entirely. It is a 152-line niche feature that detects manually-completed items by matching scope globs against git history. Nobody uses it and it adds significant weight.
item.description: cmd_backlog_sync (152 lines) cross-references item scope globs against git diff to guess which items were completed outside aishore. This is speculative, rarely accurate, and never used in practice. Remove the function, its router entry in cmd_backlog, and its help text entries.
steps: Remove sync entry from cmd_backlog router
Remove sync from help text and usage docs
Verify: all other backlog subcommands still work
acceptanceCriteria: cmd_backlog_sync function does not exist in the script
Running .aishore/aishore backlog sync prints unknown command error
All other backlog subcommands work: list, add, show, edit, check, rm, history, populate
